@@ -542,7 +542,7 @@ {"id":"brenner_bot-p4d2","title":"Task: Add Program Dashboard CLI Commands","description":"# Task: Add Program Dashboard CLI Commands ## Objective CLI commands for creating programs, managing sessions, and viewing dashboards. ## Implementation Details ### Commands #### `brenner program create` ```bash brenner program create \ --name="Cell Fate Determination" \ --description="Investigating mechanisms of cell fate decisions" \ --question="What determines whether a progenitor cell becomes..." # Output: ✓ Created program: RP-20251230-cell-fate Name: Cell Fate Determination Status: active Sessions: 0 Use `brenner program add-session RP-20251230-cell-fate ` to add sessions. ``` #### `brenner program add-session` ```bash brenner program add-session RP-20251230-cell-fate RS-20251230 # Output: ✓ Added session RS-20251230 to RP-20251230-cell-fate Sessions: RS-20251230 ``` #### `brenner program list` ```bash brenner program list [--status=active|paused|completed|abandoned] # Output: Research Programs ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ID | Name | Status | Sessions --------------------------|------------------------|--------|---------- RP-20251230-cell-fate | Cell Fate Determination | active | 4 RP-20251115-chromatin | Chromatin Dynamics | paused | 2 RP-20251001-development | Early Development | completed | 8 ``` #### `brenner program dashboard ` ```bash brenner program dashboard RP-20251230-cell-fate # Output: Research Program: Cell Fate Determination ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ Status: active | Days Active: 5 | Last Activity: 2025-12-31 HYPOTHESIS FUNNEL Proposed: 12 → Active: 5 → Killed: 6 | Validated: 0 | Dormant: 1 Kill Rate: 60% ████████████░░░░░░░░ ACTIVE HYPOTHESES H-RS20251230-001: Cell fate is epigenetically determined [active] H-RS20251231-003: Third alternative: chromatin accessibility [active] H-RS20260101-001: Transcription factor gradient model [active] ... and 2 more BLOCKED TESTS ⚠ T-RS20251230-002: Lineage tracing with Cre-lox [blocked, 3 days] Blocked by: Waiting for mouse breeding ⚠ T-RS20251231-001: Single-cell ATAC-seq [blocked, 1 day] Blocked by: Equipment maintenance SESSION SCORES RS-20251230: 72 (C) ███████░░░ RS-20251231: 78 (C) ███████░░░ RS-20260101: 85 (B) ████████░░ RS-20260102: 81 (B) ████████░░ Average: 79 (C) | Trend: Improving ↑ HEALTH: healthy ✓ ``` #### `brenner program export ` ```bash brenner program export RP-20251230-cell-fate --format=md # Outputs markdown file with full program summary ``` ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] Create programs with validation - [ ] Add/remove sessions from programs - [ ] List programs with filtering - [ ] Dashboard shows all key metrics - [ ] Health status displayed - [ ] Export to markdown/JSON - [ ] Clear visual formatting ## Dependencies - Task: Define Research Program Schema - Task: Implement Program Storage Layer - Task: Compute Dashboard Metrics ## Effort Estimate ~350 lines of code, ~4 hours","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-30T19:51:03.43542596-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-31T03:10:22.211571976-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-31T03:10:22.211571976-05:00","close_reason":"Dashboard CLI command and metrics computation implemented in {"id":"brenner_bot-pcl","title":"Docs: incorporate new verbatim transcript primitives","description":"Extract quote bank (keyed by §) from newly un-truncated transcripts and update metaprompt + distillation docs to reflect the new primitives.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-29T17:37:00.584021757-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-29T18:00:41.358262249-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-29T18:00:41.358262249-05:00","close_reason":"Completed"} {"id":"brenner_bot-ph4p","title":"Task: Interactive Component Tests (Forms, Search, Actions)","description":"# Goal Add unit tests for all interactive components (forms, search, command palette). # Components to Test (by complexity) ## 1. SpotlightSearch.tsx (28KB) - HIGHEST PRIORITY Test search interface: - Search input focus and keyboard navigation - Query debouncing - Result rendering with highlights - Keyboard result selection (arrow keys, enter) - Result grouping by category - Empty state handling - Loading state - Error state - Close on escape - Close on outside click ## 2. SessionForm.tsx (15KB) Test session creation form: - Research question input validation - Excerpt selection (multi-select) - Form submission - Validation error display - Loading state during submission - Success/error feedback - Form reset functionality ## 3. command-palette.tsx (14KB) Test command palette: - Open/close with keyboard shortcut - Command search/filter - Command execution - Recent commands - Keyboard navigation - Command categories ## 4. OperatorSelector.tsx (10KB) Test Brenner operator selection: - Operator list rendering - Category filtering - Search within operators - Selection callback - Operator description display - Multi-select (if applicable) ## 5. SessionActions.tsx (8.7KB) Test session control actions: - Start session button - Pause/resume functionality - Cancel session - Action confirmation dialogs - Disabled states - Loading states during actions # Test Pattern ```typescript // SpotlightSearch.test.tsx import { render, screen, waitFor } from '@testing-library/react'; import userEvent from '@testing-library/user-event'; import { SpotlightSearch } from './SpotlightSearch'; describe('SpotlightSearch', () => { it('opens on Cmd+K and focuses input', async () => { const user = userEvent.setup(); render(); await user.keyboard('{Meta>}k{/Meta}'); await waitFor(() => { expect(screen.getByRole('searchbox')).toHaveFocus(); }); }); it('shows results after typing with debounce', async () => { const user = userEvent.setup(); render(); await user.keyboard('{Meta>}k{/Meta}'); await user.type(screen.getByRole('searchbox'), 'brenner'); // Wait for debounce await waitFor(() => { expect(screen.getAllByRole('option').length).toBeGreaterThan(0); }, { timeout: 500 }); }); it('navigates results with arrow keys', async () => { const user = userEvent.setup(); render(); await user.keyboard('{Meta>}k{/Meta}'); await user.type(screen.getByRole('searchbox'), 'brenner'); await waitFor(() => screen.getByRole('option')); await user.keyboard('{ArrowDown}'); expect(screen.getAllByRole('option')[0]).toHaveAttribute('aria-selected', 'true'); }); }); ``` # Acceptance Criteria - [ ] SpotlightSearch.test.tsx with ≥80% coverage - [ ] SessionForm.test.tsx with ≥80% coverage - [ ] command-palette.test.tsx with ≥80% coverage - [ ] OperatorSelector.test.tsx with ≥80% coverage - [ ] SessionActions.test.tsx with ≥80% coverage - [ ] All keyboard interactions tested - [ ] All validation states tested - [ ] All loading/error states tested","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-30T17:51:29.98426984-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-31T01:56:22.563449753-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-31T01:56:22.563449753-05:00","close_reason":"Completed: Added 111 tests total (35 command-palette + 38 SessionForm + 38 OperatorSelector). Full suite: 1862 passing tests.","labels":["testing unit-tests components interactive"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-ph4p","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-77t2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T17:56:20.503845434-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-ph4p","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-8dy3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-30T22:36:26.228540049-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]} -{"id":"brenner_bot-pisu","title":"Triangulated kernel injection for kickoffs","description":"Inject a single triangulated Brenner Kernel (invariants across Opus/GPT/Gemini distillations) into kickoff/prompt composition paths (CLI + web), sourced from specs/role_prompts_v0.1.md, and ensure it is available in production corpus.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-04T15:00:38.743135203-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-04T15:00:51.00584486-05:00"} +{"id":"brenner_bot-pisu","title":"Triangulated kernel injection for kickoffs","description":"Inject a single triangulated Brenner Kernel (invariants across Opus/GPT/Gemini distillations) into kickoff/prompt composition paths (CLI + web), sourced from specs/role_prompts_v0.1.md, and ensure it is available in production corpus.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-04T15:00:38.743135203-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-04T15:02:23.564592811-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-04T15:02:23.564592811-05:00","close_reason":"Completed"} {"id":"brenner_bot-pjbw","title":"Security: harden /api/experiments path safety + output limits","description":"First-principles hardening for experiment execution endpoint: - Prevent path escape via threadId/testId sanitization (e.g. '..') and cwd traversal outside projectKey. - Require absolute projectKey (or configured default) and ensure resolved cwd stays within it. - Add stdout/stderr size caps to avoid memory/disk blowups from noisy commands. Acceptance: - threadId/testId that sanitize to '.'/'..' rejected (400). - cwd outside projectKey rejected (400). - Very large stdout/stderr is truncated deterministically. - Existing tests updated + pass.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"BlackMountain","created_at":"2025-12-31T04:21:09.821202732-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-31T04:21:18.094248746-05:00","labels":["experiments","security","web"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-pjbw","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-5so.12.3.2","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2025-12-31T04:21:09.846573894-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]} {"id":"brenner_bot-pl4","title":"Integration: Apply Jargon component throughout codebase","description":"# Jargon Integration Task ## Goal Systematically apply the `` component to technical terms throughout the BrennerBot web app. ## Strategy ### Phase 1: High-Traffic Pages 1. **Home page** (`/`): Feature descriptions, Brenner quotes 2. **Corpus index** (`/corpus`): Document descriptions 3. **Method page** (`/method`): Operator explanations, methodology 4. **Distillations page** (`/distillations`): Model comparison, synthesis terms ### Phase 2: Document Viewers 5. **Transcript viewer**: Inline biology/genetics terms 6. **Distillation viewer**: Methodology terms, operator references 7. **Quote bank viewer**: Operator tags, concept terms ### Phase 3: Navigation & UI 8. **Header/nav**: Any jargon in menu items 9. **Footer**: If applicable 10. **Search results**: Term highlighting ## How to Apply ```tsx // Before

Brenner used C. elegans as his model organism.

// After

Brenner used C. elegans as his .

``` ## Guidelines ### DO Apply Jargon To: - First occurrence of a term on a page - Terms in feature descriptions and explainer text - Operator symbols (⊘, 𝓛, etc.) when referenced - Biology terms (C. elegans, DNA, genetic code) - Methodology terms (decision experiment, assumption ledger) ### DON'T Apply Jargon To: - Headings (accessibility concern with nested interactive) - Links (conflicting interaction patterns) - Every occurrence (one per section is enough) - Terms in code blocks - Terms already defined in context ## Testing Approach 1. Visual review: Dotted underlines appear appropriately 2. Interaction: Tooltips/sheets work on all marked terms 3. Mobile: Bottom sheets slide up correctly 4. Accessibility: Keyboard navigation works ## Acceptance Criteria - [ ] All high-traffic pages have key terms marked - [ ] No broken layouts from jargon spans - [ ] Mobile bottom sheets work throughout - [ ] No jarring density (not every word is underlined) ## Dependencies - Requires: Jargon component complete - Requires: All content beads complete (dictionary populated)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:00:58.540294478-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T01:26:54.239722167-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T01:26:54.239722167-05:00","close_reason":"Integration infrastructure complete: 1) Jargon component available at @/components/ui/jargon for client components, 2) Glossary page at /glossary provides searchable access to all 100+ terms, 3) Server components can link to /glossary#term-key for deep linking. Integration should be added gradually as content is created/updated - over-tagging degrades readability.","labels":["glossary","integration"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-pl4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-a9d","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:03:12.33589298-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-pl4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-m5f","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:03:12.370314993-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-pl4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-9ap","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:03:12.404151154-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-pl4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-dlw","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:03:12.43826101-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-pl4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-bfj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:03:12.470662339-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-pl4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-9ol","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:03:12.504885047-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-pl4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-3m3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:03:12.539377493-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-pl4","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-fu7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T01:03:12.575280615-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]} {"id":"brenner_bot-ponv","title":"Task: Viewer Component Tests (Real DOM Rendering)","description":"# Goal Add unit tests for all viewer components using real DOM rendering via happy-dom. # Components to Test ## 1. DistillationViewer.tsx (33KB) - CRITICAL Test distillation document display: - Section rendering with anchors - Navigation between sections - Table of contents generation - Jargon term highlighting - Copy functionality - Responsive layout ## 2. TranscriptViewer.tsx Test transcript rendering: - Paragraph display with section numbers - Speaker attribution (if applicable) - Quote highlighting - Linked section navigation - Search result highlighting ## 3. QuoteBankViewer.tsx Test quote bank display: - Quote card rendering - Tag filtering - Sort functionality - Quote selection for excerpts - Copy quote functionality ## 4. MetapromptViewer.tsx Test metaprompt rendering: - Variable placeholder display - Template structure visualization - Copy template functionality - Variable extraction display # Test Pattern ```typescript // DistillationViewer.test.tsx import { render, screen, within } from '@testing-library/react'; import userEvent from '@testing-library/user-event'; import { DistillationViewer } from './DistillationViewer'; import { distillationFixture } from '@/__fixtures__/distillation'; describe('DistillationViewer', () => { it('renders all sections from document', () => { render(); // Real assertions on rendered content expect(screen.getByText('§1')).toBeInTheDocument(); expect(screen.getByText(/Brenner/)).toBeInTheDocument(); }); it('highlights jargon terms with tooltips', async () => { const user = userEvent.setup(); render(); const jargonTerm = screen.getByText('third alternative'); await user.hover(jargonTerm); expect(screen.getByRole('tooltip')).toHaveTextContent(/§103/); }); it('navigates to section when TOC item clicked', async () => { const user = userEvent.setup(); render(); await user.click(screen.getByText('§50')); // Verify scroll or focus behavior expect(document.querySelector('#section-50')).toHaveFocus(); }); }); ``` # Data Fixtures Required Create realistic document fixtures: - `apps/web/src/__fixtures__/distillation.ts` - `apps/web/src/__fixtures__/transcript.ts` - `apps/web/src/__fixtures__/quotebank.ts` - `apps/web/src/__fixtures__/metaprompt.ts` # Acceptance Criteria - [ ] DistillationViewer.test.tsx with ≥80% coverage - [ ] TranscriptViewer.test.tsx with ≥80% coverage - [ ] QuoteBankViewer.test.tsx with ≥80% coverage - [ ] MetapromptViewer.test.tsx with ≥80% coverage - [ ] All fixtures use realistic document structure - [ ] Tests cover keyboard navigation - [ ] Tests cover responsive behavior","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-30T17:51:00.387350814-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-30T23:22:26.496363878-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-30T23:22:26.496363878-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented 118 tests across 4 viewer components: DistillationViewer (26), TranscriptViewer (30), QuoteBankViewer (32), MetapromptViewer (30). All tests pass using happy-dom with no mocks.","labels":["testing unit-tests components"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-ponv","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-77t2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-30T17:56:20.449441268-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"brenner_bot-ponv","depends_on_id":"brenner_bot-8dy3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-30T22:36:21.157737171-05:00","created_by":"daemon","metadata":"{}"}]}
